title: Instrumental Mobs
description: Giving instruments to Minecraft mobs since 2018
body:
This mod gives instrument to a select amount of monsters

Currently it adds the following instrumental mobs:
  • French Horn Creepers
  • Tuba Enderman
  • Drum Zombies
  • Cymbal Husks
  • Xylophone Skeletons
  • Maraca Spiders
  • Microphone Ghasts
Each of the instrumental mobs have a chance to drop their instrument.


This mod was highly inspired by JamiesWhiteShirt's mod "Trumpet Skeleton" and Darkosto's Twitch chat.
